title: CVE-2026-31887 - Shopware unauthenticated data extraction possible through store

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-31887 - Shopware unauthenticated data extraction po
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/16
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '6.6.10.15'
            - '6.7.8.1'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*store-api.order*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 6.6.10.15 any (msg:"CDB APEX — CVE_2026_31887___Shopware_unau"; sid:4725704; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 6.7.8.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX — CVE_2026_31887___Shopware_unau"; sid:2385765; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 6.6.10.15 any (msg:"CDB APEX CVE_2026_31887___Shopware_unau"; sid:6826300; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 6.7.8.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX CVE_2026_31887___Shopware_unau"; sid:6550973; rev:1;)
